creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Kdepim is what korganizer evolved into. It now comes
	with a few more programs and uses KDE2/Qt2.

	It still requires gmake due to bugs in the korganizer's
	Makefile (difficult to fix). The need for bison is removed
	by the files/patch-aa.

	I'm note sure, if this should be named deskutils/kdepim
	(the package's name and analogous to the gnomepim), or
	deskutils/korganizer2...
